历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated from approximately 4330 to 5049 to 6253 to 5945 to 6732, showing an overall trend of shifting backward with fluctuations, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2400 places in the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 6732; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 69, 66, 70, 71, and 72 respectively, showing a slight increase; the planned enrollment for 2026 is 78, an increase of 6 students (+8.3%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 13th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top 20), with stable rankings between 11th and 13th in recent years, indicating a very high school level; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (such as questionable paper data), but the reputation for 2025 was relatively positive (rebound in application enthusiasm); Douyin popularity ranking is 29th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure; from 2022 to 2024, there were abnormal signals in admission, but by 2025 it had stabilized; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Business Administration and Ecology, A in Marxist Theory, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Basic Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy, and Chinese Language and Literature, indicating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively popular; the total number of examinees in this province for 2026 is approximately 521,000, a significant increase from about 358,000 in 2025, with an estimated 379,000 in the Physics Category, intensifying competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangdong (not in this province), with an enrollment proportion in Jiangsu of about 2–3% (72 students in Physics Category in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; the popularity of Guangdong universities in Jiangsu is influenced by regional preferences, but as the top university in South China, Sun Yat-sen University has strong cross-provincial appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the expansion of 6 students (+8.3%) in 2026, the significant increase in the number of examinees in this province (intensified competition), the very high school level and outstanding disciplinary strength, based on the 2025 baseline of 6732, the expansion effect and the increase in examinees partially offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7069, with a range of 6569–7569.

Medical and Computer Science majors at Sun Yat-sen University are popular choices with intense competition, so reasonable positioning is necessary.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 865 → 987 → 1024 → 923 → 1250, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it moved back about 327 places compared to 2024, marking the lowest ranking in the past five years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1250. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 30, 33, 29, 28, and 28 respectively, stabilizing at 28–29 in recent years. In 2026, the plan is 25 students, a reduction of 3 students (-10.7%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant contraction and intensified competition.
3                        .【School Level】985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 ranked 13th (Top20), with stable rankings between 11–13 in recent years, indicating a very high school level.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incidents), but in 2025, the reputation was somewhat positive (increased application enthusiasm); Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot); a signal of enrollment gaps appeared in 2022 (multiple provinces experienced cold snaps), but it has gradually recovered in recent years; the fifth round of discipline evaluation includes a total of 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Business Administration and Ecology, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A- in Sociology, Law, Philosophy, and Foreign Languages and Literatures, etc. The comprehensive coverage of humanities, history, philosophy, economics, management, and law disciplines strongly attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangdong (not the home province), enrolling about 25–30 students in History Category in Jiangsu, which is a cross-provincial enrollment. The popularity of Guangdong universities in Jiangsu is influenced by regional preferences, but as a top comprehensive university, Zhongda still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. Majors like Law and Chinese Language/Literature continue to be recommended; Finance/Economics/Economy are under observation with divergent opinions. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 521,000, a significant increase from 2025, with an estimated 142,000 in the History Category, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in historical rankings, the reduction of 3 students (-10.7%) in 2026, the significant increase in the number of candidates in the province (intensified competition), the very high school level, and the outstanding strength of humanities, history, and philosophy disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 1250, the combined effect of enrollment reduction and increased candidates, but; taking into account the additional pressure from increased candidates, a slight correction predicts the minimum ranking to be approximately 1200, with a range of 700–1700.
